{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Security constructs
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Security constructs]] can use launchers to attack.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] has four oblong security constructs floating behind him.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
